name: Xu Xun

sections.short-biography: Yuan Shao claimed he was sent to supervise Cao Cao’s restoration of the Han court.

full_text:
Xu Xun
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xu Xun. Yuan Shao claimed he was sent to supervise Cao Cao’s restoration of the Han court. Xu Xun may not have existed in history. Xu Xun was affiliated with Yuan Shao.
